inputs.label: standard
inputs.subject: A factory worker operating a large industrial press in a manufacturing plant
inputs.context: Feature article about the decline of manufacturing jobs and the human cost of automation
inputs.lighting: Industrial interior, overhead fluorescent and natural light from high windows
inputs.style: Documentary photography, slightly warm and desaturated

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.subject: A journalist working late at a desk covered in papers
inputs.context: Newsletter header for a media industry publication

inputs.label: european
inputs.subject: A fisherman mending nets on a small boat in a Greek island harbour at dawn
inputs.context: Long-form magazine article about the collapse of small-scale Mediterranean fishing communities under EU regulation
inputs.register: Quiet, intimate, observational — the fisherman is unaware of the camera
inputs.lighting: Pre-dawn blue light transitioning to early morning gold
inputs.style: Mediterranean documentary photography, slightly cool palette
